basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Centre for Science Education (HBCSE)
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Centre for Science Education (HBCSE) Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.hbcse.tifr.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HBCSE Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any stream. Excellent oral and written communication skills in English, Marathi and Hindi. 0-10 years of experience in Day Care/Montessori/Childcare services/Pre-School as Administrator or Coordinator.
qualification.details: Graduate in any stream. Excellent oral and written communication skills in English, Marathi and Hindi. 0-10 years of experience in Day Care/Montessori/Childcare services/Pre-School as Administrator or Coordinator. Desired: Training in Montessori, diploma in child psychology, training in human resource management.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HBCSE Supervisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download HBCSE Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.homi_bhabha_centre_for_science_education: Graduate in any stream. Excellent oral and written communication skills in English, Marathi and Hindi. 0-10 years of experience in Day Care/Montessori/Childcare services/Pre-School as Administrator or Coordinator.

content_sections.heading: HBCSE Supervisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HBCSE Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HBCSE Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HBCSE Supervisor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate in any stream. Excellent oral and written communication skills in English, Marathi and Hindi. 0-10 years of experience in Day Care/Montessori/Childcare services/Pre-School as Administrator or Coordinator. Desired: Training in Montessori, diploma in child psychology, training in human resource management.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for HBCSE Supervisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HBCSE Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the HBCSE Supervisor post is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Supervisor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any stream. Additionally, excellent oral and written communication skills in English, Marathi, and Hindi are essential.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Supervisor position?
faq.answer: Yes, the role requires 0-10 years of experience in Day Care, Montessori, Childcare services, or Pre-School as an Administrator or Coordinator.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Supervisor position at HBCSE.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Supervisor job at HBCSE?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Supervisor post will be commensurate with the candidate's experience.

faq.question: Q7. What are the preferred qualifications for the Supervisor role?
faq.answer: Desired qualifications include training in Montessori, a diploma in child psychology, and training in human resource management.

faq.question: Q8. Where is HBCSE located?
faq.answer: HBCSE is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Supervisor position at HBCSE is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
